items.title: Connect GitHub remote to Vercel — auto-alias on deploy
items.note: Currently the witty-hq.vercel.app alias needs to be manually set after every deploy. Connecting the GitHub remote to Vercel will make deploys auto-assign the alias so it sticks without the manual step.

items.title: QB: Create income account — Client Reimbursements
items.note: Pass-through setup (1 of 3). In QuickBooks: Chart of Accounts → New → Income → name it 'Client Reimbursements'. This is where client payments for pass-through costs land. The CFO script already excludes this account from gross revenue — no script changes needed.

items.title: QB: Create expense account — Client Reimbursements - Cost
items.note: Pass-through setup (2 of 3). In QuickBooks: Chart of Accounts → New → Expenses → name it 'Client Reimbursements - Cost'. When you pay a vendor for a pass-through item, code the payment here — NOT back to the income account. The CFO script strips this from the expense base symmetrically.

items.title: QB: Create product/service item — Equipment Rental (Pass-Through)
items.note: Pass-through setup (3 of 3). In QuickBooks: Products & Services → New → Service → name it 'Equipment Rental - Pass-Through' (or whatever fits) → map it to the 'Client Reimbursements' income account. Use this line item on client invoices for any pass-through costs.
